name: vanilla-tilt
when_to_use: 卡片/商品格/头像/图片上的交互式 3D 悬停倾斜带视差 glare 时用它;单元素 tilt+glare 用它,多层视差弹出用分层库(如 atropos)。你给元素 + options,它接管指针→transform 数学与 glare。
why_valuable: 把 perspective/transform/glare 数学调到显高级而非扭曲很难;AI 手搓出僵硬或明显变形的倾斜。

en.when_to_use: Use it for interactive 3D hover tilt with parallax glare on cards, product tiles, avatars, or images. Use it for single-element tilt plus glare; for multilayer parallax pop-out, use a layered library such as atropos. You provide an element plus options, and it handles pointer-to-transform math and glare.
en.why_valuable: Tuning perspective/transform/glare math to look polished rather than distorted is difficult. AI hand-builds stiff or visibly warped tilts.

data_in.note: It operates on an existing element. The glare element is created inside the target, so no external CSS is required. Import side effects set window.VanillaTilt and automatically initialize [data-tilt] elements in the document; do not put data-tilt on host nodes that should not tilt automatically.

schema.target: string selector | Element | Element[] - element(s) to tilt, resolved to nodes in boot and allowed inside shadow

options?.max?: number - maximum tilt angle in degrees, default 15
options?.perspective?: number - perspective distance; smaller is more dramatic, default 1000
options?.speed?: number - enter/leave transition speed in ms, default 300
options?.axis?: 'x' | 'y' | null - constrain to one axis, default null
options?.gyroscope?: boolean - gyroscope on mobile, default true
options?.full-page-listening?: boolean - listen to mouse movement across the whole page, default false

data_in.note: 作用于一个已存在元素;glare 元素会创建在目标内部,无需外链 CSS。import 副作用:设 window.VanillaTilt 并自动 init 文档里的 [data-tilt] —— 别把 data-tilt 打在不想被自动倾斜的宿主节点上。

schema.target: string 选择器 | Element | Element[] —— 要倾斜的元素(boot 里解析为节点,可在 shadow 内)

options?.max?: number —— 最大倾斜角(度),默认 15
options?.perspective?: number —— 透视距离,越小越夸张,默认 1000
options?.speed?: number —— 进出过渡速度 ms,默认 300
options?.max-glare?: number —— 高光最大不透明度 0..1,默认 1
options?.reverse?: boolean —— 反向倾斜,默认 false
options?.axis?: 'x' | 'y' | null —— 限制单轴,默认 null
options?.gyroscope?: boolean —— 陀螺仪(移动端),默认 true
options?.full-page-listening?: boolean —— 监听整页鼠标,默认 false

example._why: target 传 CSS 选择器(boot 解析为元素);options 用 kebab 键 max-glare/full-page-listening 对齐真实 API。

uplink: 纯 local-interact,默认不上行;若需实时倾斜值,消费 AI 直接调实例 getValues() 并按载体处理。

carriers.widget: supported:对 shadow 元素 init,glare 嵌在目标内、transform inline,无全局 CSS;注意 import 会设 window.VanillaTilt 并自动 init 文档 [data-tilt]
carriers.codex: supported:default export,无 worker/wasm/uplink 硬依赖

isolation.evidence: API correct: +esm default export(n as default)= VanillaTilt;d.ts:constructor(element, settings?) + static init(elements, settings?);默认已实测:max 15、perspective 1000、scale 1、speed 300、glare false、max-glare 1、gyroscope true、reverse false、transition true。IMPORT 副作用(grep +esm 尾):`typeof document<'u'&&(window.VanillaTilt=n,n.init(document.querySelectorAll('[data-tilt]')))` —— import 即赋 window.VanillaTilt 并自动 init 文档 [data-tilt]。globalStyleInjection=no:glare/transform 为目标上/内 inline 样式;document.body 仅被 READ 取 clientWidth/Height 回退(无 body append)。globalDomMutation=yes:import 期的 window 全局 + document [data-tilt] 扫描。globalEvents=yes:每实例元素指针事件 + window 'resize';gyroscope 时 window 'deviceorientation';destroy() 移除。shadowCompatible=yes:对显式 shadow 元素 init,glare 嵌在目标内。
